status.title: View Regular Session Board Meeting
status.bodySample: Skip to Main Menu Skip to Main Content Skip to Footer SEARCHTRANSLATELogin About Us Expand About Us submenu | Meetings| Policies| HomeMeetings Listing Meeting Type Regular Session Board Meeting Meeting 04/23/2026 - 06:00 PM - Regular Session Board Meeting Regular Session Board Meeting | 04/23/2026 -

Items.Title: A. Call to Order in Open Session - no earlier than 5:00 PM
B. Adoption of Closed Session Agenda
C. Public Comments Regarding Closed Session Agenda Items

Children.Title: 1. Student Discipline - Student Expulsion Hearings [Pursuant to Education Codes 35146 and 48918]
2. Personnel [Pursuant To Government Code Section 54957 (b) (1)]
3. Conference with Legal Counsel - Existing Litigation [Pursuant to Government Code Section 54956.9(d)(1)]
4. Conference with Labor Negotiator [Pursuant to Government Code Section 54957.6 (a)]
5. Conference with Real Property Negotiators [Pursuant to Government Code Section 54956.8]

Items.Title: F. Reconvene in Open Session - no earlier than 6:00 PM
H. Adoption of Open Session Agenda
J. Public Comments for Items Not on the Agenda
K. Action, Information, and Discussion Items

Children.Title: 1. Cancellation of Regular Session Board Meeting (ACTION)
2. Amendment to Board Policy and Administrative Regulation 6020: Parent Involvement (1st Reading) (INFORMATIONAL)
3. Updated Parent/Student Handbook for the 2026-2027 School Year (1st Reading) (INFORMATIONAL)
4. 2026 California School Boards Association Delegate Assembly Run-off Election (ACTION)
5. Measure R CBOC Annual Report  (ACTION)
6. Student Expulsion Case 2025-2026-009 (ACTION)
7. Student Expulsion Case 2025-2026-010 (ACTION)
8. Student Expulsion Case 2025-2026-012 (ACTION)
1. Board of Education and Student Board Member
2. Superintendent and Executive Staff
1. Approval of the Minutes of the Special Session Meetings held February 24, 2026 March 3, 2026, March 10, 2026, and March 21, 2026
2. Approval of the Minutes of the Regular Session Meeting held March 26, 2026
1. Acceptance of Gifts (ACTION)
2. Management Personnel Actions (ACTION) - None
3. Certificated Personnel Actions (ACTION)
4. Classified Personnel Actions (ACTION)
5. Short-term Limited Services Agreements (ACTION)
6. Monthly Reports for the Month of March 2026 (ACTION)
7. Quarterly Report on Williams Uniform Complaints (ACTION)
8. Amendment to Board Policy and Administrative Regulation 5125: Student Records (2nd Reading) (ACTION)
9. Board Policy and Regulation 5125.1: Release of Directory Information (2nd Reading) (ACTION)
10. Independent Contractor Agreement with Galileo Learning, LLC (ACTION)
11. Dual Enrollment Partnership Agreement (CCAP) (SJECCD) (ACTION)
12. Independent Contractor Agreement with Ellen Hoke Corp (ACTION)
13. Independent Contractor Agreement with Safeguard, Inc. (ACTION)
14. Master Group Use Agreement with YMCA Camp Campbell Outdoor Science School (ACTION)
15. Independent Contractor Agreement with Curriculum Associates: Classroom Mathematics California and i-Ready (ACTION)
16. Independent Contractor Agreement with Savvas Learning Company: enVision+ California (Algebra 1, Geometry, Algebra 2) (ACTION)
17. Purchase with McGraw Hill for California Inspire Science Print and Digital Access (ACTION)
18. Independent Contractor Agreement with KNN Public Finance, LLC (ACTION)
19. Joint Use Agreement with Rising Star SpEd Academy (ACTION)
20. Delegation of Authority for Operations and Maintenance Services of Solar Electric Generation Facilities (ACTION)
21. Ratification of Construction and Purchasing Related Contracts and Items (ACTION)
1. Next Board Meeting - May 7, 2026
